narrative:
Massillon City Sd city school district has 16,977 registered voters, with 60.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 16.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 23.2%, a clear Democratic lean of 7.3 percentage points. Registration is trending redder in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +0.5% D−R vs +9.9% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
